# Knowledge Park 360

> Knowledge Park 360 is an admission consultancy guiding students into SRM Chennai and Bangalore's top engineering colleges. We provide end-to-end counselling for KCET, COMEDK, SRMJEE, JET, and management quota admissions, with 13,000+ students placed across leading institutions.

We help families compare colleges by rank, fee, placement record, and entrance-exam cutoffs, then handle the full admission process — counselling rounds, document verification, and seat confirmation.

## Pages

- [Home](https://knowledgepark360.com/): Overview of services, featured colleges, testimonials, and counsellor contact.
- [All Colleges](https://knowledgepark360.com/colleges): Complete listing of SRMIST and top Bangalore engineering colleges with quick filters.
- [About Knowledge Park 360](https://knowledgepark360.com/about): Mission, team, methodology, and admission track record.
- [Privacy Policy](https://knowledgepark360.com/privacy): How we collect, use, and protect lead information.
- [Terms and Conditions](https://knowledgepark360.com/terms): Service terms governing the consultancy engagement.

## Colleges

- [SRM Institute of Science and Technology (Chennai)](https://knowledgepark360.com/college/srm): NAAC A++, Top 10 NIRF, 92 LPA highest package, 800+ recruiters. SRMJEE and management quota admissions.
- [RV College of Engineering (RVCE)](https://knowledgepark360.com/college/rvce): #1 ranked in Karnataka, NAAC A+, 67 LPA highest package. KCET and COMEDK admissions.
- [BMS College of Engineering (BMSCE)](https://knowledgepark360.com/college/bmsce): Oldest private engineering college in Karnataka, NAAC A+, 52 LPA highest package.
- [MS Ramaiah Institute of Technology (MSRIT)](https://knowledgepark360.com/college/msrit): Top placements, NAAC A, 45 LPA highest package.
- [PES University](https://knowledgepark360.com/college/pesu): NAAC A+, tier-1 infrastructure, 58 LPA highest package, COMEDK and PESSAT admissions.
- [BMS Institute of Technology (BMSIT)](https://knowledgepark360.com/college/bmsit): NAAC A, research-focused, 38 LPA highest package.
- [Bangalore Institute of Technology (BIT)](https://knowledgepark360.com/college/bit): Central V.V. Puram location, NAAC A, 32 LPA highest package.
- [Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering (DSCE)](https://knowledgepark360.com/college/dsce): NAAC A, vibrant campus, 30 LPA highest package.
- [Nitte Meenakshi Institute of Technology (NMIT)](https://knowledgepark360.com/college/nmit): Autonomous, NAAC A+, 28 LPA highest package.
- [RNS Institute of Technology (RNSIT)](https://knowledgepark360.com/college/rnsit): Strong CSE placements, NAAC A, 26 LPA highest package.
- [Sir M. Visvesvaraya Institute of Technology (Sir MVIT)](https://knowledgepark360.com/college/smvit): Legacy autonomous campus, NAAC A, 24 LPA highest package.
- [Jain (Deemed-to-be University)](https://knowledgepark360.com/college/jain): NAAC A++, multidisciplinary deemed university, 50 LPA highest package, JET admissions.

- [Sitemap](https://knowledgepark360.com/sitemap.xml): XML sitemap of all indexable pages.
